title: ThyssenKrupp to close Terre Haute manufacturing plant in 2027
description:
Thyssenkrupp Presta North America LLC is planning to close its manufacturing facility in Terre Haute in 2027, affecting some 230 employees, the company announced Friday.

title: Greene County hospital serves Anthem with second breach notice over claim payments
description:

description:

title: Building Corvettes and caring for cattle: Indiana’s push to reinvent high school gains steam
description:
More high schoolers are preparing for work, and more schools and employers are helping them find work opportunities, as Indiana shifts to a high school model that emphasizes career experience.

title: South Bend approves $4.6M infrastructure support for affordable housing project
description: The South Bend Redevelopment Commission approved a development agreement Thursday committing $4.6 million in city infrastructure funding to support construction of 42 affordable housing units on the city’s near west side

title: Oakland City University not closing, spokesperson says
description:
Oakland City University said this week that a "strategic partnership" will allow it to continue operating despite earlier reports that the university would be shutting down.
